args:
set -eu
PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH"
if ! command -v serena >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "Serena is not installed. Install it with Homebrew so the 'serena' binary is globally available." >&2
  exit 1
fi
exec serena start-mcp-server --context codex
serena.note: Apple Silicon macOS-only stdio launcher. Requires a globally installed Homebrew `serena` binary in `/opt/homebrew/bin`; after startup, activate the current project in Serena.
